parameters.apprise_url_plus: parseps://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.app_id_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.master_key_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Parse Platform destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise parseps:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

app_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Parse Platform app id

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Parse Platform host

master_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Parse Platform master key
